one_time_description: Specific claim funding and expenditure from Government of Canada
economic_notes: Band has no land base, only 12 members, one of the smallest First Nations in Canada. Member of BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership receiving 7% of net provincial gaming revenues. Active specific claims litigation against Government of Canada with CIBC loan facility of $2,802,573 covered by insurance arrangement.
notes: Band has only 12 members and no land base - extremely small First Nation (Qayqayt First Nation). Significant off-balance-sheet contingent liability: CIBC loan of $2,802,573 plus accrued interest of $641,362 totalling $3,443,935 for specific claims litigation, not recorded on balance sheet due to insurance arrangement covering repayment if claims unsuccessful. Assets held in trust of $187,276 recorded as deferred contributions. Ottawa Trust Fund of $1,913 held in Consolidated Revenue Fund of Canada. Deferred contributions of $1,397,891 are the dominant liability. No tangible capital assets. No remuneration schedule provided.
